name: impleload
title: Impleload
description: Operate Impleload implementation workload data from the CLI.
setup_instructions: Configure IMPLELOAD_AGENT_TOKEN only when the agent should use token-based agent auth. OAuth is also supported by running `impleload auth login` before asking the agent to make changes.

dependencies.name: impleload CLI
dependencies.check: command -v impleload || command -v impleload.exe || test -x "$HOME/.local/bin/impleload" || test -x "$HOME/.local/bin/impleload.exe"

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Backend URL
fields.help: Optional backend URL used by the CLI. Leave the production default unless targeting dev or staging.

fields.name: agent_token
fields.label: Agent Token
fields.help: Optional token for token-based agent auth. If configured, commands must still provide exactly one actor with --actor-email or --actor-discord-user, or the matching environment variable.
